name: Banana Split Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Pineapple juice, heated from fresh pineapple
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients (EXCEPT CHOCOLATE CHIPS AND CHERRIES) into the inner pan in the order listed.
2. Select white bread and push "Start."
3. Add the chocolate chips and cherries when the Auto Bakery "beeps," 88 minutes into the cycle.
